title: PR Description
description: Schema for the PR description Marcus produces at pre-merge sanity review (Pantheon Mini V8.11). Arthur owns the merge gate; Marcus owns the description.

project_slug.description: Lowercase hyphen-separated slug. Must match workspace/01_PRDs/<slug>.md.

summary.description: One-sentence summary that fits in the PR title.

what_changed.description: Bullet list of concrete code changes. Files touched, modules added, behavior altered.

why.description: Link back to the PRD goal. Why this change exists; what user-facing or system outcome it enables.

red_tests.description: IDs / paths of red tests Marcus wrote that are now green.

all_green.description: True only if every test in the test plan passes. Arthur rejects merge if false.

additional_tests_added.description: Optional: tests Jack added beyond Marcus's red plan.

escalation_chain.description: Optional. Present only if any senior tier (Marcus 13-15 / Maxwell 16-17 / Cody 18 / Magnus 19) was activated during this ticket.

log_refs.description: Paths to SOLUTION_LOG / CODE_FIX_LOG / APPROACH_SOLUTION_LOG entries in workspace/wiki/errors/.

rollback_plan.description: Optional but required for risky merges. One sentence on how to revert.

all_green.description: Mirrors tests.all_green. Arthur checks this field at merge.

rtk_squashed.description: True if description body fits Arthur's 3-line routing summary.

lane_within_cap.description: True if merging this PR does not exceed Arthur's max_active_lanes=2.
